name: swe

Provides slash commands /swe:start (apertura sessione + pull-first 11 repo + briefing), /swe:end (chiusura D6 + commit atomic + V1 parity verify), /swe:compact (mid-session compact + sub-agent delegation). Hooks SessionStart/SessionEnd/UserPromptSubmit forced-eval (84-100% skill activation). Pattern Anthropic 2026 native namespaced /swe:<command>. Empire governance V1-V6 binding, PROTOCOLLO GO non derogabile, LL-Empire 28+ lezioni binding.
